sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78278" key="parakte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρακτέον</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">παράγω</etym>) <sense id="n78278.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must have recourse to</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ταῦτα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg005:96" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.96</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
